race.description: Insight Building Services Super Maiden Hcp
race.comment: HELLFIGHTER (6) was snagged back from a wide alley then went through the gears nicely for a midfield finish when resuming over 1280m at Muswellbrook last start. Drops a massive 6kgs after the claim under today's scale. Needs this sort of trip now so everything points towards a big run. DON'T TELL POLLY (9) was close enough on straightening but lacked the change of gears required when midfield first-up over 1300m at Hawkesbury. No surprise if she showed a bit more today over the extra trip on a roomier circuit. LET'S BE HONEST (10) was well in commission and wasn't beaten far when resuming over 1250m here recently. Ran a couple of very nice races over 1600m last prep so the extra 250m should play right into her hands. ZAMAZING (8) registered a fifth minor placing from ten starts when runner-up over 1400m at Kembla last start. Very fit and is sure to be thereabouts again. MADE IN ITALY (3) resumes. Placed three from three in the maiden prep and this looks a nice launching pad.
